RUNTIME-01.desc: stage execution persists checkpointed state and stage history

RUNTIME-02.desc: pause requests yield a paused checkpoint and resume continues from the next stage

RUNTIME-03.desc: managed job files auto-resume through resumeManagedJobs without manual stage reconstruction

RUNTIME-04.desc: failed verification queues an auto-improvement experiment

RUNTIME-05.desc: schedule manager builds a managed async-job-runner command for job files

RUNTIME-06.desc: verify-run full includes the runtime proof lane and artifact

RUNTIME-07.desc: packaged thumbcheck runtime boots local API and serves dashboard affordances
